scene: A stick figure looking straight ahead with wide eyes and a big red question mark, big black caps YOU'VE NEVER SEEN THE PRESENT. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

A beam of light traveling from a lamp toward a stick figure's eye with tiny clock marks along it, big black caps LIGHT TAKES TIME. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
A stick figure's head opened showing a brain slowly assembling a picture, big black caps YOUR BRAIN IS SLOWER. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
The stick figure looking at the world with a faint ghost label over everything, big black caps IT'S ALL THE PAST. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
